title: Discovery
description: Any service that helps the user to identify and locate EO resource starting from his needs.

definitions.definition: Any service that helps the user to identify and locate EO resource starting from his needs. See also search and discovery .
definitions.notes: Finding Aid: a type of Access Aid that allows a user to search for and identify Archival Information Packages of interest.
definitions.sources:
- [CEOS/WGISS/DSIG/GLOS](https://ceos.org/document_management/Working_Groups/WGISS/Interest_Groups/Data_Stewardship/White_Papers/EO-DataStewardshipGlossary.pdf)
- [CEOS EO Data Stewardship Glossary](https://ceos.org/document_management/Working_Groups/WGISS/Interest_Groups/Data_Stewardship/White_Papers/EO-DataStewardshipGlossary.pdf)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
